seo.title: Stripe Connect vs PayPal for Marketplaces vs Sharetribe
seo.description: A practical comparison of Stripe Connect, PayPal for Marketplaces, and Sharetribe for Marketplaces.

content.intro: Developers building marketplace platforms evaluate tools for payment handling, search, trust systems, and scalability. This comparison focuses on implementation trade-offs for core marketplace requirements.

options.name: Stripe Connect
options.tagline: Scalable payment infrastructure for multi-party transactions
options.best_for: Complex payment splitting, escrow, and compliance requirements

options.name: Sharetribe
options.tagline: Fully hosted marketplace platform with built-in matching logic
options.best_for: Rapid prototyping and minimum viable product development

options.name: Supabase
options.tagline: Open-source Firebase alternative with real-time database
options.best_for: Custom backend development with PostgreSQL flexibility

options.name: Algolia
options.tagline: Search and discovery API with ranking customization
options.best_for: Advanced product matching and search relevance optimization

options.name: PayPal for Marketplaces
options.tagline: Legacy payment solution with marketplace-specific features
options.best_for: Existing PayPal ecosystems requiring multi-party transactions

criteria.name: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Time required to integrate core marketplace functionality

criteria.name: Lock-in Risk
criteria.description: Technical and contractual constraints limiting future migration

criteria.name: Cost Profile
criteria.description: Predictability of pricing model for scaling operations

criteria.name: Reliability
criteria.description: Uptime guarantees and error handling for critical operations

criteria.name: Scalability
criteria.description: Ability to handle growing user bases and transaction volumes

criteria.name: Customization
criteria.description: Flexibility to modify core marketplace logic and workflows

criteria.name: Ease of Integration
criteria.description: Compatibility with existing tech stacks and frameworks

criteria.name: Support Ecosystem
criteria.description: Availability of documentation, community, and enterprise support

verdict.summary: Stripe Connect offers robust payment handling with higher implementation complexity, while Sharetribe provides rapid deployment at the cost of flexibility. Supabase and Algolia excel in customization but require more development effort. PayPal for Marketplaces remains viable for legacy systems but shows signs of aging infrastructure.

use_cases.reason: Low implementation effort and built-in marketplace logic

use_cases.scenario: Global marketplace with complex payment needs
use_cases.reason: Reliable payment splitting and compliance features
Better long-term support than PayPal for Marketplaces
